prompt: Build me a confirmation dialog component in React that fades in with a backdrop blur, scales up from 95%, and animates out when dismissed. Use the motion library.

assertions.text: AnimatePresence stays mounted (not wrapped in conditional) — the conditional is INSIDE AnimatePresence
Has exit prop on the animated element for unmount animation
Backdrop includes blur effect (backdrop-blur or filter: blur)
Initial/animate includes scale transition from 0.95 to 1
Children of AnimatePresence have unique key props
